title: Green Synthesis of Selenium Nanoparticles Using Rosemary Aqueous Extract and Ascorbic Acid
author: Mohammadreza Ashayeri

steps.title: Weigh 1 g dried rosemary leaves...
steps.instruction: Weigh 1 g dried rosemary leaves and grind to fine powder.

steps.title: Add to 100 mL fresh deionized water to a beaker
steps.instruction: Add to 100 mL fresh deionized water to a beaker.

steps.title: Heat to 40 °C and stir...
steps.instruction: Heat to 40 °C and stir at 1800 rpm for 60 minutes.

steps.title: Transfer to a centrifuge tube and...
steps.instruction: Transfer to a centrifuge tube and centrifuge at 6000 rpm for 30 minutes.

steps.title: Collect the supernatant
steps.instruction: Collect the supernatant.

steps.title: Filter through Whatman No
steps.instruction: Filter through Whatman No.1 OR 0.45 µm membrane.

steps.title: Store at 4 °C (use within 24–48 hours)
steps.instruction: Store at 4 °C (use within 24–48 hours).

steps.title: Dissolve 0
steps.instruction: Dissolve 0.263 g Na₂SeO₃ in 100 mL DI water.

steps.title: Dissolve 0
steps.instruction: Dissolve 0.176 g ascorbic acid in 100 mL DI water. Prepare fresh; sensitive to oxidation.

steps.title: Heat 20 mL Na₂SeO₃ to 60 °C
steps.instruction: Heat 20 mL Na₂SeO₃ to 60 °C.

steps.title: Add 20 mL rosemary extract dropwise...
steps.instruction: Add 20 mL rosemary extract dropwise over 2–4 minutes while stirring, then continue stirring for 30 minutes total.

steps.title: Add 20 mL 10 mM ascorbic...
steps.instruction: Add 20 mL 10 mM ascorbic acid dropwise over 3–5 minutes while stirring, then continue stirring for 30 minutes total.

steps.title: Incubate at 37 °C for 48 hours
steps.instruction: Incubate at 37 °C for 48 hours.

steps.title: Centrifuge at 8000 rpm for 20 minutes
steps.instruction: Centrifuge at 8000 rpm for 20 minutes.

steps.title: Discard supernatant
steps.instruction: Discard supernatant.

steps.title: Resuspend pellet in DI water
steps.instruction: Resuspend pellet in DI water.

steps.title: Repeat 2–3 times
steps.instruction: Repeat 2–3 times.

steps.title: Rosemary-capped NPs may require 10–12k rpm
steps.instruction: Rosemary-capped NPs may require 10–12k rpm. If no pellet forms, add 50 mM NaCl to reduce colloidal stability.

steps.title: UV–Vis
steps.instruction: UV–Vis: Expected peak: 260–300 nm.

steps.title: DLS
steps.instruction: DLS: Expected size: 45–90 nm depending on formulation.

steps.title: Zeta Potential
steps.instruction: Zeta Potential: Se-AA-Ros: approx. –15 mV

steps.title: XRD
steps.instruction: XRD: Match with JCPDS 06-0362 (trigonal Se)

steps.title: FTIR
steps.instruction: FTIR: O–H stretching (3300 cm^^–1^^) C=O (1730 cm^^–1^^) Phenolic groups ~1600 cm^^–1^^

steps.title: Problem 1
steps.instruction: Problem 1: No color change Possible Causes: - Ascorbic acid oxidized - Rosemary extract degraded - pH too low/high Solutions: - Prepare fresh AA - Re-extract rosemary - Adjust pH to 6.5–7.5

steps.title: Problem 2
steps.instruction: Problem 2: Large particle size (>150 nm) Possible Causes: - Rapid addition of reducing agents - Overheating (>65 °C) - Too high concentration of extract Solutions: - Add extract slowly (>3 min) - Maintain strict 60 °C - Dilute extract 1:1

steps.title: Problem 3
steps.instruction: Problem 3: Aggregation during or after synthesis Causes: - Over-reduction - Ionic contamination Solutions: - Lower AA concentration - Use ultrapure water - Limit reaction time

steps.title: Problem 4
steps.instruction: Problem 4: No pellet after centrifugation Causes: - Highly colloidal NPs - Too low centrifuge speed Solutions: - Increase rpm to 12,000 - Add 50 mM NaCl to destabilize

steps.title: Problem 5
steps.instruction: Problem 5: Extremely dark brown color Cause: - Excess reductant or too rapid reduction Solution: - Slow down dropwise addition to ≥5 min

steps.title: - Sodium selenite is toxic and...
steps.instruction: - Sodium selenite is toxic and should be handled in a fume hood. - Wear gloves, mask, and goggles. - Dispose of selenium waste separately as a hazardous heavy metal. - Avoid inhalation of rosemary powder during grinding.

steps.title: Formation of stable SeNPs with red/orange coloration
steps.instruction: Formation of stable SeNPs with red/orange coloration.

steps.title: Particle size
steps.instruction: Particle size: 45–90 nm.

steps.title: Negative zeta potential (–5 to –15 mV) ensures stability
steps.instruction: Negative zeta potential (–5 to –15 mV) ensures stability.

steps.title: Stable dispersions for up to 4 weeks at 4 °C
steps.instruction: Stable dispersions for up to 4 weeks at 4 °C.

steps.title: Rosemary extract improves capping efficiency and nanoparticle uniformity
steps.instruction: Rosemary extract improves capping efficiency and nanoparticle uniformity.

description: Graphical abstract illustrating green synthesis methods of selenium nanoparticles using Rosmarinus officinalis extract and ascorbic acid, typical characterization results (UV-Vis spectroscopy and DLS size distribution).
